summary: Closure round. Re-ran suites fresh: build+typecheck green, 301/301 unit, 62/62 e2e (the two TEST-002 tests now genuine passes, test.fail() annotations removed by the fix). Confirmed hands-on in a real browser: click reveals edge handles immediately (no nudge), click-away hides them immediately (no floating dot), full pin round-trip (grab/drag/pin/persist/reload/reset) still works, zero console errors, zero runtime network. Closed REV-009 (stale nudge-related comments in e2e/interactive-editing.spec.ts, my file) directly. TEST-002 -> verified. 0 open/new issues. Verdict: green. Advancing to phase 5 (report/knowledge).
